channel.title: GitHub Vue Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: primefaces/primevue
item.description: Next Generation Vue UI Component Library

item.title: alireza0/s-ui
item.description: An advanced Web Panel • Built for SagerNet/Sing-Box

item.title: imsyy/home
item.description: 个人主页，我的个人主页，个人主页源码，主页模板，homepage

item.title: pipipi-pikachu/PPTist
item.description: An online presentation application that replicates most of the commonly used features of Microsoft Office PowerPoint, allowing for the editing and presentation of PPT online. It also supports the export of PPT files.

item.title: qier222/YesPlayMusic
item.description: 高颜值的第三方网易云播放器，支持 Windows / macOS / Linux

item.title: nihaojob/vue-fabric-editor
item.description: 快图设计-基于fabric.js和Vue的开源图片编辑器，可自定义字体、素材、设计模板。fabric.js and Vue based image editor, can customize fonts, materials, design templates.

item.title: imsyy/SPlayer
item.description: 🎉 一个简约的音乐播放器，支持逐字歌词，下载歌曲，展示评论区，音乐云盘及歌单管理，音乐频谱，移动端基础适配 | 网易云音乐 | A minimalist music player

item.title: dreamhunter2333/cloudflare_temp_email
item.description: CloudFlare free temp domain email 免费收发 临时域名邮箱 支持附件 IMAP SMTP TelegramBot

item.title: RikkaApps/websites
item.description: Websites for Rikka apps.

item.title: viarotel-org/escrcpy
item.description: 📱 Graphical Scrcpy to display and control Android, devices powered by Electron. | 使用图形化的 Scrcpy 显示和控制您的 Android 设备，由 Electron 驱动。

item.title: wangyuan389/mall-cook
item.description: 商城低代码平台，可视化搭建H5、小程序多端商城

item.title: lin-xin/vue-manage-system
item.description: Vue3、Element Plus、typescript后台管理系统

item.title: kailong321200875/vue-element-plus-admin
item.description: A backend management system based on vue3, typescript, element-plus, and vite

item.title: yangzongzhuan/RuoYi-Vue3
item.description: 🎉 (RuoYi)官方仓库 基于SpringBoot，Spring Security，JWT，Vue3 & Vite、Element Plus 的前后端分离权限管理系统

item.title: vueComponent/ant-design-vue
item.description: 🌈 An enterprise-class UI components based on Ant Design and Vue. 🐜

item.title: nuxt/ui
item.description: A UI Library for Modern Web Apps, powered by Vue & Tailwind CSS.

item.title: radix-vue/radix-vue
item.description: Vue port of Radix UI Primitives. An open-source UI component library for building high-quality, accessible design systems and web apps.

item.title: requarks/wiki
item.description: Wiki.js | A modern and powerful wiki app built on Node.js

item.title: nuxt/nuxt.com
item.description: The Nuxt website, made with Nuxt.

item.title: chaitin/xray
item.description: 一款完善的安全评估工具，支持常见 web 安全问题扫描和自定义 poc | 使用之前务必先阅读文档

item.title: epicmaxco/vuestic-admin
item.description: Free and Beautiful Vue 3 Admin Template
